summary: Learn module end-to-end tested. Backend: 18/19 pytest tests PASS (94.7%). Frontend: All 10 requested flows PASS. One backend regression found: /api/outcome-types returns 404 due to decorator being commented out on server.py:1291 ('# ---------- Outcome Type Registry Endpoint ----------@api_router.get("/outcome-types")' — the @api_router.get is glued to the trailing comment). All Learning Journey CRUD, unauthorized checks, user isolation, and frontend flows (login, tab structure, header-avatar, Me screen, create/list/detail/edit/delete of journeys, Goals regression) verified working.

critical.issue: Returns 404 Not Found. Root cause: /app/backend/server.py line 1291 has `# ---------- Outcome Type Registry Endpoint ----------@api_router.get("/outcome-types")` — the route decorator is on the same line as a Python comment, so `@api_router.get(...)` is treated as part of the comment and never applied. The `async def get_outcome_types(): ...` function ends up undecorated, so the route is never registered. Fix: put the decorator on its own new line (i.e., break `----------` and `@api_router.get(...)` onto separate lines).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning at runtime: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Non-blocking on web, but worth migrating shadow* to boxShadow (or platform-guarded) for future React Native Web compatibility. Grep for shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset in styles (e.g., /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx centerButton styles).

action_items: Fix /app/backend/server.py line 1291: move `@api_router.get("/outcome-types")` onto its own new line. Currently the decorator is glued to a trailing comment, causing /api/outcome-types to 404. Verify by curling GET /api/outcome-types with a bearer token — expect 200 with {"types": {...}}.
(Minor) Replace deprecated `shadow*` style props with `boxShadow` on web or platform-guard them to silence the React Native Web deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1291 – decorator placed on the same line as a section comment ('...----------@api_router.get("/outcome-types")'). Comment eats the decorator; endpoint silently missing. Always keep decorators on their own line.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_learning_journeys.py (new pytest suite for Learn module + regression checks)
seed_data_creation: Created transient users via /api/auth/signup (test_lj_<uuid>@example.com) and TEST_-prefixed Learning Journeys during pytest; each test class deletes its own records. Primary account (test@hymn.app) had one residual journey from a prior run visible in Learn list — cosmetic only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_learning_journeys.py — run with `pytest backend/tests/test_learning_journeys.py -v`. Once server.py:1291 is fixed, TestRegression::test_endpoint_ok[/outcome-types] should also pass, taking backend to 19/19. Frontend testIDs for Learn: learn-add-button, learn-empty-add-button, learn-row-{id}, learn-detail-title/edit-button/delete-button, learn-delete-modal + learn-delete-modal-confirm/cancel, add-learn-*-input, edit-learn-*-input. Header avatar testID is 'header-avatar' on Today/Timeline/Finance/Learn.
rca_of_issue: /api/outcome-types 404 RCA: server.py:1291 reads '# ---------- Outcome Type Registry Endpoint ----------@api_router.get("/outcome-types")'. The `#` starts a Python comment that runs to end-of-line, swallowing `@api_router.get("/outcome-types")`. The following `async def get_outcome_types()` therefore has no route decorator. Reproduction: `curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' <base>/api/outcome-types` returns `{"detail":"Not Found"}` with 404. Mitigation: split the line so the decorator sits on its own line, e.g., insert a newline before `@api_router.get`.
